document.docAuthor: Brescovit, Antonio Domingos, Zampaulo, Robson De Almeida, Cizauskas, Igor & Pedroso, Leandro
document.docTitle: Speocera pinima Brescovit & Zampaulo & Cizauskas & Pedroso 2022, sp. nov.
document.masterDocTitle: Three new subterranean species of the genus Speocera (Araneae, Ochyroceratidae) from caves of the Carajás area in the state of Pará, Brazil

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: Three new subterranean species of the genus Speocera (Araneae, Ochyroceratidae) from caves of the Carajás area in the state of Pará, Brazil

mods:name.mods:affiliation: Laboratório de Coleções Zoológicas, Instituto Butantan, Av. Vital Brasil, 1500, Butantã, São Paulo-São Paulo, Brazil, 05503 - 900 Gerencia de Licenciamento Ambiental e Espeleologia, Vale SA, Avenida Doutor Marco Paulo Simon Jardim, 34006 - 200 Nova Lima- Minas Gerais, Brazil
Organização de Apoio à Pesquisa da Biodiversidade (OAPBio), Rua Frei Inácio da Conceição 238, 05362 - 040, São Paulo, São Paulo, Brazil

Laboratório de Coleções Zoológicas, Instituto Butantan, Av. Vital Brasil, 1500, Butantã, São Paulo-São Paulo, Brazil, 05503 - 900 Gerencia de Licenciamento Ambiental e Espeleologia, Vale SA, Avenida Doutor Marco Paulo Simon Jardim, 34006 - 200 Nova Lima- Minas Gerais, Brazil

subSubSection.paragraph:
Type material .
Male holotype and female paratype from Cave N 5SM2_0022 ( GEM 1721 )
,
Parauapebas ( 50°8′7,00”N 6°8′7,49″W ,
455 m
), Pará , Brazil ,
19.X.2010
, R.A. Zampaulo et al. coll. ( IBSP 286062 )
.
Paratypes : 2♂ from Cave N 5SM2_0058 ( GEM _1682) ( 50°8′5,34”N 6°7′45,73″W ),
549 m
, Parauapebas , Pará , Brazil ,
18.X.2010
, R.A. Zampaulo et al. Col. ( IBSP 286070 )
;
1♀ from Cave N5SM2_0078 ( GEM 1761 ), ( 50°7′48,8”N 6°7′23,04″W )
,
518 m
, Parauapebas , Pará , Brazil ,
28.IX.2010
, R.A. Zampaulo et al. Col. ( IBSP 286073 )
;
1♂ 1♀ from Cave N5SM2_ 0078 ( GEM 1761 ) ( 50°7′48,8”N 6°7′23,04″W )
,
518 m
, Parauapebas , Pará , Brazil ,
28.IX.2010
, R.A. Zampaulo et al. Col. ( ISLA , ex IBSP 286072 )
.

caption.paragraph:
FIGURE 1.
Speocera pinima
sp. nov.
, male (IBSP 286064). A habitus, dorsal view. B Left palp, retrolateral view. C same, ventral view. D same, prolateral view. E Embolus, ventral view (ISLA 78430). F same (ISLA 78464), variation. Abbreviations: B, bulb; C, conductor; E, embolus; SC, associated sclerites (SCI, SCII, SCIII and SCIV); SO, spermatic opening.

materialsCitation.collectorName: Cave N & R. A. Zampaulo & Cave SL

caption.paragraph:
FIGURE 2.
Speocera pinima
sp. nov.
, male (ISLA 78430), SEM images. A carapace, eyes, frontal view B chelicerae, endites and labium, crosier-like macrosetae (arrow, detail), ventral view C chelicerae, ventral view D epiandrous area, abdomen, ventral view E colulus, abdomen, ventral view F male palp, cymbium, tarsal organ, distal area, dorsal view.

FIGURE 3.
Speocera pinima
sp. nov.
, left male palp (ISLA 78430), SEM images. A cymbium, tarsal organ, distal area, detail. B palpal tibia, trichobothria, dorsal view C palp, retrolateral view D bulb, ventral view E embolus, v entral view F Same, retrolateral view. Abbreviations: B, bulb; C, conductor; E, embolus; SC, associated sclerites (SCI, SCII, SCIII and SCIV); SO, spermatic opening.

FIGURE 4.
Speocera pinima
sp. nov.
, male (ISLA 78430), SEM images. A Right embolus, ventral view. B Same, variation (ISLA 78464) C Ocular area, frontal view D Endites, crosier-like macrosetae (arrow, detail), ventral view. Abbreviations: B, bulb; C, conductor; SC, associated sclerites (SCI, SCII, SCIII and SCIV); SO, spermatic opening.

subSubSection.paragraph: Etymology . Name from the Tupi-Guarani ‘ pinima ’, an adjective meaning spotted with different colors on the body; noun in apposition.

Diagnosis .
Speocera pinima
sp. nov.
differs from
S. babau
sp. nov.
and
S. piquira
sp. nov.
by the male having pentagonal SCI in the embolus and slender conductor in the palp ( Figs. 1E–F ; 3E–F ; 4A–B )—while in the other two species it is elongated, and having a preeminent conductor; figs 7E, 12E. The female of
Speocera pinima
sp. nov.
resemble those of
S. babau
sp. nov.
by its long afferent spermathecae and elongated lateral plates ( Figs 5D–F ; 6D ) but differs by oval spermathecae ( Fig. 5E–F ) and tapered and curved terminal depression ( Figs. 5D ; 6D ) in the genitalia.

caption.paragraph:
FIGURE 5.
Speocera pinima
sp. nov.
, female (IBSP 286071). A. Habitus, dorsal view. B–C. Abdomen. B. lateral view. C. Same, ventral view. D–F. Genitalia. D. Lateral view. E. enzyme cleared, dorsal view (ISLA 78421). F. Same, dorsal view. Abbreviations: AS, afferent spermathecae; CC, copulatory channel; LP, lateral plate; S, spermathecae; TD, terminal depression; VP, ventral plate.

FIGURE 6.
Speocera pinima
sp. nov.
, female (ISLA 78461), SEM images. A pedipalp, distal view B colulus, abdomen, ventral view C External genitalia, ventral plate, ventral view D Same, lateral plate, ventral view. Abbreviations: CC, copulatory channel; LP, lateral plate; TD, terminal depression; VP, ventral plate.

subSubSection.paragraph: Variation . 10 ♂♂ : total length 0.75 – 0.9; carapace 0.27 – 0.43; femur I 0.26 – 0.44. 10 ♀♀ : total length 0.76 – 0.86; carapace 0.31 – 0.44; femur I 0.23 – 0.35.

Distribution . Known only from iron caves in the Serra Norte (municipality of Paraupebas) and Serra Leste (municipality of Curionópolis) in the region of the Carajás, Pará state , northern Brazil in a range of approximately 60 km ( Fig. 19B, E ).
